svg.aria-label: roadmap.sh 2026 DevSecOps roadmap 93 learning items covering OWASP Top 10 2025 and NIST CSF 2.0 integration, GitHub Advanced Security pipeline integration, threat modeling and secure coding fundamentals for modern DevOps teams.
svg.title: 2026-01-10: DevSecOps 2026 roadmap 93 items, OWASP Top 10, NIST CSF 2.0

g.text: Threat modeling : SAST+DAST in CI : container...
Pipeline gate coverage : SAST finding MTTR : IaC...
Checkov IaC scan : Semgrep SAST : Gitleaks secret scan :...
OWASP Top 10:2025 updated categories : NIST CSF...
OWASP coverage in tests : risk register update cadence
Map OWASP to test cases : update risk register quarterly :...
GitHub Advanced Security CodeQL SAST : secret...
CodeQL alert resolution SLA : Dependabot PR merge rate
Enable push protection : CodeQL P1 fix in 7 days :...
